name: date-relative-not-resolved-at-parse-time
description: older_than:5d parses as DateValue::Relative, NOT a resolved NaiveDate. The contract: the same AST means the same thing tomorrow.

spec.behavior: Backends call ParserOptions::now_provider at query-execution time to resolve relative durations. The AST is `now`-pure so it serialises and round-trips cleanly.
